lines.speaker: Shiratti the Custodian
lines.text: Be Careful in here and don't touch anything! There's some old and valuable artefacts around here. Careless outsiders.. you're always coming in and making a mess of things!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok calm down, I'm not going to touch anything.

lines.speaker: Shiratti the Custodian
lines.text: This is our local shrine to She.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean by She?

lines.speaker: Shiratti the Custodian
lines.text: Such ignorance! I suppose I should come to expect it. People are forgetting the old ways of the desert around here. But then.. What do those bureaucratic fools in Menaphos expect! If they're going to take so long to

lines.speaker: Shiratti the Custodian
lines.text: send us a new priestess of She. Do you know we haven't had one for five years now!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Errm you still haven't told me what you mean by She.

lines.speaker: Shiratti the Custodian
lines.text: She! Otherwise know as Elidinis, Goddess of growth and fertility, Lady of the river, Wife of Tumeken, Flower of the desert, Mother of Icthlarin.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That all sounds very confusing, I might just call her Elidinis for short.

lines.speaker: Shiratti the Custodian
lines.text: Thanks for returning the statuette. You have freed us of our curse. May you forever be considered a friend of Elidinis and her followers.
